title: Can Aliens Read Our Minds?!
summary: This interview excerpt discusses telepathic communication, featuring claims about entities (possibly future humans) demonstrating mind-reading abilities, and references Elon Musk's statements about communicating without words. The conversation explores implications of telepathy on facial expressions and richer communication.

key_claims.claim: Entities told the speaker they knew he was thinking about quitting, despite him never speaking those words aloud
The entities identified themselves as future humans when the speaker communicated telepathically
Elon Musk told the speaker that humans will be able to talk without words
Telepathic beings would not need facial expressions and would have richer, more complete communication than humans
